title: 02496_Dynamic_Regularized_Sharpness_Aware_Minimization_in_Federated_Learning_Approaching_Global_Consistency_and_Smooth_Landsca
positive_examples: The proposed FedSMOO algorithm improves the performance of federated learning (FL) by ensuring global consistency and generalization, which can enhance the effectiveness of collaborative machine learning across diverse datasets.

FedSMOO achieves a faster convergence rate and higher generalization accuracy, particularly in scenarios with high data heterogeneity, which can lead to better model performance in real-world applications.
